expectations.evidence: Use when someone needs a report, dashboard, scorecard, spreadsheet, or metric snapshot translated into plain-English ins

expectations.text: Name is kebab-case and under 64 characters
Description is specific and under 1024 characters
Safety section has at least three guardrails
No forbidden CMS wording in skill body
Eval prompt is present and realistic
expectations.evidence: Explain this scorecard for a sales team: 12 people are above goal, 8 are close, 5 are behind, and we need to decide where coaching goes next.
The skill tells the assistant not to invent causes behind numbers. The skill translates metrics into action. The output includes unknowns or data gaps.

claims.claim: The skill package is structurally valid for v1 smoke testing.

uncertainties: No no-skill baseline was run in this lightweight smoke-test pass.
